proof:
have hdecomp :
    constApproxError2 u0 u1 c =
      p0ProjectionResidualSq2 u0 u1 + 2 * (c - cellAverage2 u0 u1) ^ 2 := by
  unfold constApproxError2 p0ProjectionResidualSq2 cellAverage2
  ring
rw [hdecomp]
have hsq : 0 <= (c - cellAverage2 u0 u1) ^ 2 := sq_nonneg _
nlinarith

unfold weightedP0Average
have hsum : (∑ i ∈ s, m i * (c * u i)) = c * (∑ i ∈ s, m i * u i) := by
  rw [Finset.mul_sum]
  apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
  intro i hi
  ring
rw [hsum]
rw [mul_div_assoc]

have hLeftBounds : -M ≤ uLeft ∧ uLeft ≤ M := abs_le.mp hLeft
have hRightBounds : -M ≤ uRight ∧ uRight ≤ M := abs_le.mp hRight
apply abs_le.mpr
constructor
· calc
    -M = laxFriedrichsStep cfl (-M) (-M) := by
      simpa using (laxFriedrichsStep_const cfl (-M)).symm
    _ ≤ laxFriedrichsStep cfl uLeft uRight := by
      exact laxFriedrichsStep_monotone cfl (-M) (-M) uLeft uRight
        hcflLower hcflUpper hLeftBounds.1 hRightBounds.1
· calc
    laxFriedrichsStep cfl uLeft uRight ≤ laxFriedrichsStep cfl M M := by
      exact laxFriedrichsStep_monotone cfl uLeft uRight M M
        hcflLower hcflUpper hLeftBounds.2 hRightBounds.2
    _ = M := by
      simpa using laxFriedrichsStep_const cfl M

unfold weightedP0Average
rw [← Finset.sum_mul]
field_simp [hmass] <;> ring

unfold heatLeftWeight heatCenterWeight heatRightWeight
constructor
· exact hr0
· constructor
· linarith
· exact hr0

have hflux : kdvCanonicalFlux (fun _ => c) = fun _ : Nat => 3 * c ^ 2 := by
  funext j
  exact kdvCanonicalFlux_const c j
rw [hflux]
exact fluxDifference_const_zero (3 * c ^ 2) i

unfold vec2InfNorm
apply max_le
· unfold diag2First
rw [abs_mul]
exact mul_le_mul ha (le_max_left (|x|) (|y|)) (abs_nonneg x) hrho
· unfold diag2Second
rw [abs_mul]
exact mul_le_mul hb (le_max_right (|x|) (|y|)) (abs_nonneg y) hrho

unfold centeredSignal finiteMean finiteDC
rw [Finset.sum_sub_distrib, Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
field_simp [hcard] <;> ring
